name: Friendly Cartoon Spider
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a friendly cartoon spider with a big round body, a smaller round head, eight evenly spaced bent legs, two large happy eyes and a cheerful smile, sitting upright and waving one leg

name: Spider on a Web
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a smiling garden spider sitting in the center of a large round spider web with neat radiating spokes and spiral threads, the web stretched between two leafy twigs

name: Fuzzy Tarantula
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a chunky tarantula with a wide hairy body and thick fuzzy legs covered in short bristles, two small fangs at the front, standing low on the ground with all eight legs spread out

name: Cute Baby Spider
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a tiny round baby spider with a chubby body, eight short stubby legs, two huge sparkly eyes and a sweet little smile, sitting on a single dewdrop leaf

name: Jumping Spider
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a wide-eyed jumping spider with a compact fuzzy body, two very large round front eyes and several smaller eyes, short sturdy legs crouched as if ready to pounce, an alert curious expression

name: Daddy Longlegs
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a daddy longlegs with a tiny oval body and eight extremely long, thin, gently curved legs splayed wide, standing tall over a small pebble and a blade of grass

name: Spider in a Web Corner
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a spider hanging from a single silk thread beside a triangular corner web with spiral threads, a small fly caught at the edge of the web, a couple of leaves framing the corner

name: Two Spider Friends
subject: animals/spider
prompt: two friendly round cartoon spiders sitting side by side on a leaf, each with eight legs and big smiling eyes, one slightly bigger than the other, holding two of their legs together like holding hands

name: Spider Face Close-Up
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a close-up front view of a spider's face filling the frame, eight rounded eyes arranged in two rows, a fuzzy textured head, two small fangs below, and the tops of its front legs raised at the sides

name: Halloween Spider
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a spooky-cute spider dangling from a silk thread above a carved jack-o-lantern, a wispy web with a crescent moon and a couple of bats in the background, a friendly grinning face

name: Spider with Dewy Web
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a detailed spider resting on a large circular web heavy with round dew drops along every thread, the web strung between tall grass stalks, a few flowers blooming at the base

name: Spider Building a Web
subject: animals/spider
prompt: a busy spider mid-task spinning a half-finished web, a strand of silk trailing from its body as it connects two spiral threads, the outer spokes already in place between two branches
